returns._0: The value of the slot as bytes32

params.nSlots: Number of slots to be read.

params.slots: List of slots to tload from.

transientAccess(bytes32).notice: Provides access to a single Nofeeswap transient storage slot.

transientAccess(bytes32,uint256).notice: Provides access to consecutive Nofeeswap transient storage slots.

transientAccess(bytes32[]).notice: Provides access to a given list of Nofeeswap transient storage slots.
